notes: POOL-LEVEL ONLY. Escrow/per-escrow lifecycle invariants are NOT modeled. Escrow-level properties (single settlement, signature verification, Axelar gateway gating, deadline-based refund) require an escrow-aware model extension.

invariant_mapping.english: Total token balance held by the contract must never go negative.
Total held cannot exceed the practical supply cap.

coverage.recommendation: Extend trusted core with an escrow_pool model that tracks per-escrow state (payer, payee, deposit, spent, settled, deadline) and escrow lifecycle invariants.
